title: Weekly Market Report | May 4–8, 2026
report:
## Japan Equity Markets — Weekly Overview

The Nikkei 225 moved **+1,373 pts (+3.8%)** this week (36,148 → 37,521).

The average return across all 67 themes was **+4.5%**.

---

## 📅 Key Events & News This Week

- FOMC holds rates at 3.50-3.75%
- US April payrolls +220K (beat)
- Nvidia announces mass production of Blackwell Ultra GPU
- Post-Golden Week buying surge

---
